title: ligularia qiaojiaensis
intro: Ligularia qiaojiaensis, also known as Qiaojia ligularia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpenoids and phenolic compounds. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and protecting against cardiovascular diseases. Ligularia qiaojiaensis is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
